text:
Sure! Here's a short, fictional tale about a wise old owl who learns the value of friendship.

Once upon a time in the heart of Whispering Woods, there was an old owl named Oaky. Known far and wide for his wisdom and gentle voice, Oaky lived in a cozy hollow at the edge of a sparkling lake. His nest was lined with fur from various creatures he'd encountered.

One sunny afternoon, while Oaky was attending to his usual brood of chipmunks, a young squirrel named Ember burst into his hollow with a desperate look.

"You've got to help me, Oaky," Ember pleaded. "My acorn stash disappeared during last night's storm! There aren't enough berries left!"

Ooky listened carefully. "Tell me what happened," he said softly.

Ember described how, during a thunderstorm, he'd ventured too close to the lightning thinking it made bright sounds. A bolt had zapped a whole pile of acorns.

Ooky frowned
